---
title: "Wind Data Explorations"
author: "Laurie and Frances"
date: '2026-05-13'
output: html_document
---

```{r install-packages} 
# install.packages(c("tidyverse", 
#                   "tidytext",
#                   "stopwords",
#                   "widyr",
#                   "tidygraph",
#                   "tidylo",
#                   "ggraph",
 #                  "wordcloud",
  #                 "dplyr", 
# "googlesheets4",
# "visdat",
# "naniar",
#"gargle"))
#install.packages("magrittr")
#install.packages("readxl")
#install.packages("dplyr")

```


```{r read-in-packages}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(magrittr) 
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(googlesheets4)
library(gargle)
library(googledrive)
library(visdat)
library(naniar)
library(magrittr) 
library(dplyr) 
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(circular)
library(forcats)
library(openair)
library(UpSetR)
library(readr)

```

## Read in journals data

```{r read-in-data}

library(readr)
journals <- read_csv("../data/journals_all.csv") 

journal_data <- journals |>
  select(date_mdy, journal_year, month, journal_entry, location, local_place, latitude, longitude) 

journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(wind_mentioned = case_when(str_detect(journal_entry, regex("\\bwind\\b", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "yes",
                                    TRUE ~ NA))
```


# Set up Direction Tokens

```{r direction tokens and function definition}

# Wind Search Wind Before and After ----

journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(wind_mentioned = case_when(str_detect(journal_entry, regex("\\bwind\\b", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "yes",
                                    TRUE ~ NA))


dir_token <- paste0(
  "(?i)(?<![A-Za-z'])(",
  paste(c(
    # dotted 16-point
    "N\\.N\\.E\\.|N\\.N\\.W\\.|E\\.N\\.E\\.|E\\.S\\.E\\.|S\\.S\\.E\\.|S\\.S\\.W\\.|W\\.S\\.W\\.|W\\.N\\.W\\.",
    # plain 16-point
    "NNE|NNW|ENE|ESE|SSE|SSW|WSW|WNW",
    # spaced/dotted-ish 16-point
    "N\\s*\\.?\\s*N\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|N\\s*\\.?\\s*N\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?|E\\s*\\.?\\s*N\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|E\\s*\\.?\\s*S\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|S\\s*\\.?\\s*S\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|S\\s*\\.?\\s*S\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?|W\\s*\\.?\\s*S\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?|W\\s*\\.?\\s*N\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?",
    # Unusual fused wording (Possibly think about coming after wordy 16-point)
    "NorthE|SouthE|NorthW|SouthW|WNWest",
    #dotted 8-point
    "N\\.E\\.|N\\.W\\.|S\\.E\\.|S\\.W\\.",
    # plain 8-point
    "NE|NW|SE|SW",
    # spaced/dotted-ish 8-point
    "N\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|N\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?|S\\s*\\.?\\s*E\\.?|S\\s*\\.?\\s*W\\.?",

   # 32-point "by" compass forms
"(?:North|South|East|West|N|S|E|W)\\s+by\\s+(?:North|South|East|West|N|S|E|W)",
"(?:NE|NW|SE|SW|North[-\\s]*East|North[-\\s]*West|South[-\\s]*East|South[-\\s]*West)\\s+by\\s+(?:North|South|East|West|N|S|E|W)",

    
    # wordy 16-point + 8-point + cardinals
    "West[-\\s]+North[-\\s]+West",
    "North[-\\s]*Northeast|North[-\\s]*Northwest|South[-\\s]*Southeast|South[-\\s]*Southwest",
    "East[-\\s]*Northeast|East[-\\s]*Southeast|West[-\\s]*Northwest|West[-\\s]*Southwest",
    "North[-\\s]*East|North[-\\s]*West|South[-\\s]*East|South[-\\s]*West",
    "N(?:orth)?(?:wardly|ward|Easterly|easterly|erly|Westerly|westerly|ly)?",
    "E(?:ast)?(?:wardly|ward|asternly|asterly|astly|ly)?",
    "S(?:outh)?(?:wardly|ward|outhernly|outherly|outhly|Easterly|easterly|Westerly|westerly|ly)?",
    "W(?:est)?(?:wardly|ward|esternly|esterly|estly|ly)?",
    
    # North by East
    "[NSEW]{1,2}\\s+by\\s+[NSEW]",
    
    # single letters last
    "N|E|S|W"
  ), collapse="|"),
  ")(?![A-Za-z])"
)


```

## Identify Wind Clause

```{r wind clause regex}
wind_clause_regex <- regex(
  "\\bwind\\b(?:(?:[NSEW]\\.)|[^\\n;:.])*\\.?",
  ignore_case = TRUE
)

```


```{r wind clause and then direction token}
# Get the wind clause
extract_wind_clause <- function(x) {
  str_extract(x, wind_clause_regex)
}

# -------------------------
# Extract the direction token with stringr::str_extract()
# -------------------------
# Extract wind clause, then pull out the first direction token from it.

extract_first_wind_direction <- function(x) {
  clause <- str_extract_all(x, wind_clause_regex)
  clause <- sapply(clause, paste, collapse = " , ")
  str_extract(clause, dir_token)
}

```

```{r Extract the clause before wind}
wind_before_regex_clause <- "(?i)[^\\n;:]*?\\bwind\\b"

# Get the clause before wind

extract_wind_before_clause <- function(x) {
  str_extract(x, wind_before_regex_clause)
}

# Get the direction before the wind
extract_direction_before_wind <- function(x) {
  clause <- str_extract(x, wind_before_regex_clause)
  str_extract(clause, dir_token)
}
```

```{r extract the second wind direction}

extract_second_wind_direction <- function(x) {

  clause <- str_extract(x, wind_clause_regex)

  tokens <- str_extract_all(clause, dir_token)

  sapply(tokens, function(t) {
    if (length(t) >= 2) t[2] else NA_character_
  })
}

```


```{r testing wind}

test_entries <- c(
  # One wind direction only
  "Wind N. fresh all day.",
  "The wind was S.S.W. in the morning. Went to Northeast Harbor in afternoon",

  # Two wind directions
  "Wind N. shifting to S.S.W. by evening.",
  "Wind from E.N.E. then W.S.W.",
  "Wind S.W. veering N.W.",

  # Direction before the word wind
  "N.E. wind strong with rain.",
  "S.S.W. wind moderate.",

  # Wind clause with punctuation
  "Wind N.E.; later S.W. with showers.",
  "Wind S.S.W., then calm.",
  "Wind W: afterwards N.N.E.",

  # Multiple sentences
  "Cloudy in the morning. Wind E. Later S.E.",
  "Rain. Wind S.S.W. Sea rough. Later wind to East",

  # No second wind direction
  "Wind N.W. throughout the day. Dinner at Stanley's",
  "The wind E by N. rain by spells.",

  # No wind direction at all
  "Rain all day with heavy clouds.",
  "Calm and foggy.",

  # Lowercase/mixed case
  "wind n.e. changing to s.w.",
  "Wind S.s.W. later N.n.E.",

  # Dotted and undotted versions, if you want to support both
  "Wind SSW then NNE.",
  "Wind S.S.W. then N.N.E.",

  # Potential false positives
  "Window open all day; no wind noted.",
  "The winds were strong but no direction recorded.",

  # East by North variants
  
  "Wind N by East",
  
  "Wind South by W",
  
  # Extra words between directions
  "Wind N.E. at sunrise, very strong, shifting Southwest at noon.",
  "Wind first E., afterward gradually S.S.W."
)


test_df <- tibble(
  id = seq_along(test_entries),
  category = c(
    rep("one_direction", 2),
    rep("two_directions", 3),
    rep("direction_before_wind", 2),
    rep("punctuation", 3),
    rep("multiple_sentences", 2),
    rep("no_second_direction", 2),
    rep("no_direction", 2),
    rep("case_variation", 2),
    rep("dotted_vs_undotted", 2),
    rep("false_positive", 2),
    rep("by_variants", 2),
    rep("extra_words", 2)
  ),
  entry = test_entries
)
```

```{r Normalize Wind Direction}
## Normalize

# compass map

compass_map <- c(
  # cardinal + common variants
  north      = "N",
  northly    = "N",
  northerly  = "N",
  northward  = "N",
  south      = "S",
  southly    = "S",
  southerly  = "S",
  southernly  = "S",  
  southward  = "S",
  east       = "E",
  eastly     = "E",
  easterly   = "E",
  easternly  = "E",
  eastward   = "E",
  west       = "W",
  westward   = "W",
  westerly   = "W",

  # intercardinal words
  northeast  = "NE",
  northwest  = "NW",
  southeast  = "SE",
  southwest  = "SW",
  # intercardinal words (variants & misspellings)
  northeasterly  = "NE",
  northasterly   = "NE",
  northeastward  = "NE",
  northwardeast  = "NE",
  northe         = "NE",

  northwesterly  = "NW",
  northwester    = "NW",
  northwestward  = "NW",
  northwardwest  = "NW",
  northw         = "NW",

  southeasterly  = "SE",
  southasterly   = "SE",
  southeastward  = "SE",
  southwardeast  = "SE",
  southe         = "SE",

  southwesterly  = "SW",
  southwester    = "SW",
  southwestward  = "SW",
  southwardwest  = "SW",
  southw         = "SW",

  # 16-point words
  northnortheast = "NNE",
  eastnortheast  = "ENE",
  eastsoutheast  = "ESE",
  southsoutheast = "SSE",
  southsouthwest = "SSW",
  westsouthwest  = "WSW",
  westnorthwest  = "WNW",
  northnorthwest = "NNW",
  # 16-point fused-with-ward variants
  northnortheastward = "NNE",
  eastnortheastward  = "ENE",
  eastsoutheastward  = "ESE",
  southsoutheastward = "SSE",
  southsouthwestward = "SSW",
  westsouthwestward  = "WSW",
  westnorthwestward  = "WNW",
  northnorthwestward = "NNW",
  
  # 32-point "by" compass forms
  northbyeast        = "NbE",
  nbye               = "NbE",
  nbyeast            = "NbE",
  northbye           = "NbE",
  nbyeast            = "NbE",

  northeastbynorth   = "NEbN",
  nebn               = "NEbN",
  nebyn              = "NEbN",
  northeastbyn       = "NEbN",
  nebynorth          = "NEbN",

  northeastbyeast    = "NEbE",
  nebe               = "NEbE",
  nebye              = "NEbE",
  northeastbye       = "NEbE",
  nebyeast           = "NEbE",

  eastbynorth        = "EbN",
  ebn                = "EbN",
  ebyn               = "EbN",
  eastbyn            = "EbN",
  ebynorth           = "EbN",

  eastbysouth        = "EbS",
  ebs                = "EbS",
  ebys               = "EbS",
  eastbys            = "EbS",
  ebysouth           = "EbS",

  southeastbyeast    = "SEbE",
  sebe               = "SEbE",
  sebye              = "SEbE",
  southeastbye       = "SEbE",
  sebyeast           = "SEbE",

  southeastbysouth   = "SEbS",
  sebs               = "SEbS",
  sebys              = "SEbS",
  southeastbys       = "SEbS",
  sebysouth          = "SEbS",

  southbyeast        = "SbE",
  sbe                = "SbE",
  sbye               = "SbE",
  southbye           = "SbE",
  sbyeast            = "SbE",

  southbywest        = "SbW",
  sbw                = "SbW",
  sbyw               = "SbW",
  southbyw           = "SbW",
  sbywest            = "SbW",

  southwestbysouth   = "SWbS",
  swbs               = "SWbS",
  swbys              = "SWbS",
  southwestbys       = "SWbS",
  swbysouth          = "SWbS",

  southwestbywest    = "SWbW",
  swbw               = "SWbW",
  swbyw              = "SWbW",
  southwestbyw       = "SWbW",
  swbywest           = "SWbW",

  westbysouth        = "WbS",
  wbs                = "WbS",
  wbys               = "WbS",
  westbys            = "WbS",
  wbysouth           = "WbS",

  westbynorth        = "WbN",
  wbn                = "WbN",
  wbyn               = "WbN",
  westbyn            = "WbN",
  wbynorth           = "WbN",

  northwestbywest    = "NWbW",
  nwbw               = "NWbW",
  nwbyw              = "NWbW",
  northwestbyw       = "NWbW",
  nwbywest           = "NWbW",

  northwestbynorth   = "NWbN",
  nwbn               = "NWbN",
  nwbyn              = "NWbN",
  northwestbyn       = "NWbN",
  nwbynorth          = "NWbN",

  northbywest        = "NbW",
  nbw                = "NbW",
  nbyw               = "NbW",
  northbyw           = "NbW",
  nbywest            = "NbW",

# weird OCR mashups seen in logs
  wnwest = "WNW",
  nnew   = "NNE",
  enes   = "ENE",
  eses   = "ESE",
  sseast = "SSE"
)

normalize_direction <- function(x) {
  x_clean <- tolower(x)
  x_clean <- gsub("[^a-z]", "", x_clean)

  abbr <- toupper(x_clean)
  if (abbr %in% c(
    "N","S","E","W",
    "NE","NW","SE","SW",
    "NNE","ENE","ESE","SSE",
    "SSW","WSW","WNW","NNW"
  )) return(abbr)

  if (!is.na(x_clean) && x_clean %in% names(compass_map)) {
    return(unname(compass_map[[x_clean]]))
  }

  NA_character_
}

normalize_direction_vec <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, normalize_direction, character(1))
}
```


```{r debug wind}
debug_wind <- function(x) {
  clause <- str_extract_all(x, wind_clause_regex)
  clause <- sapply(clause, paste, collapse = " , ")
  before_clause <- str_extract(x, wind_before_regex_clause)
  tokens <- str_extract_all(clause, dir_token)
  
  first <- str_extract(clause, dir_token)
  
  second <- sapply(tokens, function(t) {
    if (length(t) >= 2) t[2] else NA_character_
  })
  
  before <- str_extract(before_clause, dir_token)

  wind_dir_token <- coalesce(before, first)

  wind_dir_code_1 = normalize_direction_vec(wind_dir_token)
  
  wind_dir_code_2 = normalize_direction_vec(second)
  
  data.frame(
    entry = x,
    clause = clause,
    before_clause = before_clause,
    tokens = sapply(tokens, paste, collapse = " | "),
    first = first,
    second = second,
    before = before,
    wind_dir_token = wind_dir_token,
    wind_dir_token_2 = second,
    wind_dir_code_1 = wind_dir_code_1,
    wind_dir_code_2 = wind_dir_code_2
  )
}

check_wind <- debug_wind(test_df$entry)
```


```{r wind_extraction}
# -------------------------
# Extract clause from journal_entry
journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(wind_clause = extract_wind_clause(journal_entry),
         before_wind_clause = extract_wind_before_clause(journal_entry))

# Step B: extract first + second direction tokens from journal_entry
journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(wind_dir_token = coalesce(extract_direction_before_wind(journal_entry), extract_first_wind_direction(journal_entry)
                                   
  ),
          wind_dir_token_2 = ifelse(
  !is.na(extract_first_wind_direction(journal_entry)),
  extract_second_wind_direction(journal_entry),
  NA
  )
)
# Normalize to standard codes
journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(wind_dir_code_1 = normalize_direction_vec(wind_dir_token),
        wind_dir_code_2 = normalize_direction_vec(journal_data$wind_dir_token_2))



wind_data <- journal_data |> 
  filter(!is.na(wind_mentioned)) |> 
  select(journal_entry, wind_clause, before_wind_clause, wind_dir_token, wind_dir_code_1, wind_dir_code_2)


# Create a dataframe and have someone take a look and check.
wind_data_2_dir <- wind_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_2))
```


```{r check missing wind locations}
missing_wind <- journal_data |>
  filter(wind_mentioned == "yes", is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>
  select(date_mdy, journal_entry, wind_mentioned, wind_clause, before_wind_clause, wind_dir_code_1)

write_csv(missing_wind, file = "../data/improve_wind_search.csv")
```


```{r visualize wind location mentions}

journal_data |>
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_rev(fct_infreq(wind_dir_code_1)))) +
  geom_bar() +
  ylab("Wind Direction")


```


```{r match wind meteor direction}

compass_32_lookup <- tibble::tibble(
  wind_dir_code = c(
    "N", "NbE", "NNE", "NEbN", "NE", "NEbE", "ENE", "EbN",
    "E", "EbS", "ESE", "SEbE", "SE", "SEbS", "SSE", "SbE",
    "S", "SbW", "SSW", "SWbS", "SW", "SWbW", "WSW", "WbS",
    "W", "WbN", "WNW", "NWbW", "NW", "NWbN", "NNW", "NbW"
  ),
  wind_meteor = seq(0, 348.75, by = 11.25)
)

journal_data <- journal_data |>
  left_join(
    compass_32_lookup,
    by = c("wind_dir_code_1" = "wind_dir_code")
  ) |>
  rename(wind_meteor_1 = wind_meteor) |>
  left_join(
    compass_32_lookup,
    by = c("wind_dir_code_2" = "wind_dir_code")
  ) |>
  rename(wind_meteor_2 = wind_meteor)

```

# Wind Direction plots

## Plot of Wind Reporting

```{r}
wind_month_cat_ts <- journal_data |>
  filter(year(date_mdy) < 1896) |>
  mutate(
    year_month = as.Date(lubridate::floor_date(date_mdy, unit = "month")),
    wind_category = case_when(
  is.na(wind_mentioned) ~ "Wind status missing",
  !is.na(wind_mentioned) & is.na(wind_dir_code_1) ~
    "Wind mentioned, no direction extracted",
  !is.na(wind_dir_code_1) ~
    "Wind direction recorded",
  TRUE ~ "No wind mentioned"
)) |>
  count(year_month, wind_category, name = "n") |>
  tidyr::complete(
    year_month = seq(min(year_month, na.rm = TRUE), max(year_month, na.rm = TRUE), by = "month"),
    wind_category,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )
```

```{r}
wind_month_cat_ts_plot <- ggplot(
  wind_month_cat_ts,
  aes(x = year_month, y = n, fill = wind_category)
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "5 years",
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wind Reporting Over Time",
    subtitle = "Monthly journal entries by wind-reporting category",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of journal entries",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d()

wind_month_cat_ts_plot
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/wind_month_category_timeseries.png",
  plot = wind_month_cat_ts_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r Create Monthly Year Wind}

monthly_year_wind <- journal_data |>
  filter(year(date_mdy) < max(journal_year) & year(date_mdy) > 1872) |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_mentioned)) |>
  mutate(
    year_month = floor_date(date_mdy, unit = "month"),
    year = year(date_mdy),
    month = month(date_mdy)
  ) |>
  count(year_month, year, month, wind_dir_code_1) |>
  group_by(month, year) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    highlight = case_when(
      !wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("S", "N", "NW", "E", "W") ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ wind_dir_code_1
    )
  )

```



```{r Wind Reporting}

monthly_n_reporting <- monthly_year_wind |>
  group_by(year, month) |>
  summarise(
    total_n = sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) 

low_n_years <- monthly_n_reporting |>
  filter(total_n < 20)

month_n_trend <- ggplot(
  monthly_n_reporting,
  aes(x = factor(month, levels = 1:12, labels = month.abb),
      y = total_n)
) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "grey90", outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.5,
    size = 1.5
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = low_n_years,
    aes(label = year),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = Inf
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Frequency of Wind Direction Reports",
    subtitle = "Boxes show quartiles; points show individual years",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of wind direction reports"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) + 
  ylim(0, 32)

month_n_trend

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/month_n_trend.png",
  plot = month_n_trend,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

```


## Filter out dates outside GOM


```{r Remove dates outside GOM}
journal_data <- journal_data |>
    filter(
    !(
      date_mdy >= as.Date("1875-11-24") & # Jersey City to Italy to Haiti/Cuba and back to New York City
      date_mdy <= as.Date("1876-07-17") 
    ),
    !(
      date_mdy >= as.Date("1886-05-12") & # Travel to Philadelphia, Gloucester City and Chester.
      date_mdy <= as.Date("1886-06-04")
    )
  ) # Filter out trips to Italy and Haiti/Cuba
```


## How often does wind come from each direction? 

```{r wind direction frequency}

wind_plot <- journal_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>   
  count(wind_dir_code_1) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(prop)) |>
  mutate(
    top4 = row_number() <= 4
  ) |>
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = fct_reorder(wind_dir_code_1, prop),
      y = prop,
      fill = top4
    )
  ) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "steelblue", "FALSE" = "grey70"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "Proportion of total observations",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Proportion of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_flip()

wind_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/wind_direction_relative_frequency.png",
  plot = wind_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)



```

## 32 point compass rose

```{r 32 monthly wind heat map polar}


month_levels <- c(
  "January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June",
  "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"
)

directions <- c(
  "N", "NbE", "NNE", "NEbN",
  "NE", "NEbE", "ENE", "EbN",
  "E", "EbS", "ESE", "SEbE",
  "SE", "SEbS", "SSE", "SbE",
  "S", "SbW", "SSW", "SWbS",
  "SW", "SWbW", "WSW", "WbS",
  "W", "WbN", "WNW", "NWbW",
  "NW", "NWbN", "NNW", "NbW"
)

monthly_wind_32_heatmap <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    month = factor(month, levels = month_levels),
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(wind_dir_code_1, levels = directions)
  ) |>
  count(month, wind_dir_code_1) |>
  complete(month, wind_dir_code_1, fill = list(n = 0)) |>
  group_by(month) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n),
    n_fill = if_else(n == 0, NA_real_, as.numeric(n))
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1))

polar_32_heatmap <- ggplot(monthly_wind_32_heatmap, aes(wind_dir_code_1, month, fill = n_fill)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "lightblue",
    high = "navy",
    na.value = "white",
    name = "Count"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(month_levels)) +
  labs(
    title = "Wind Direction Counts by Month",
    x = "Wind Direction",
    y = "Month"
  ) +
  coord_polar(
  theta = "x",
  start = pi / 32 - pi/16,
  direction = -1
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_wind_direction_polar_32_heatmap.png",
  plot = polar_32_heatmap,
  width = 14,
  height = 14,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```


## Median count number of mentions per month

```{r median-by-month}
monthly_wind_heatmap <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    month = factor(month, levels = month_levels),
    year = year(date_mdy),
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(wind_dir_code_1, levels = directions)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1), !is.na(year)) |>
  count(year, month, wind_dir_code_1, name = "n") |>
  complete(
    year,
    month,
    wind_dir_code_1,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) |>
  group_by(month, wind_dir_code_1) |>
  summarise(
    median_n = median(n, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    median_fill = if_else(median_n == 0, NA_real_, as.numeric(median_n))
  )
```

```{r median wind 32 point}
polar_32_med_heatmap <- ggplot(
  monthly_wind_heatmap,
  aes(wind_dir_code_1, month, fill = median_fill)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "lightblue",
    high = "navy",
    na.value = "white",
    name = "Median count"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(month_levels)) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Wind Direction Counts by Month",
    x = "Wind Direction",
    y = "Month"
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "x", start = -pi / 32, direction = -1)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_median_wind_direction_polar_32_heatmap.png",
  plot = polar_32_med_heatmap,
  width = 14,
  height = 14,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

```


## When were fine scale wind directions reported?

```{r fine-scale wind}
compass_16 <- c(
  "N", "NNE", "NE", "ENE",
  "E", "ESE", "SE", "SSE",
  "S", "SSW", "SW", "WSW",
  "W", "WNW", "NW", "NNW"
)

fine_scale_winds <- journal_data |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    wind_dir_code_1 %in% setdiff(compass_32_lookup$wind_dir_code, compass_16)
  ) |>
  arrange(date_mdy) |>
  select(date_mdy, journal_year, wind_dir_code_1, journal_entry)

wind_precision_plot <- fine_scale_winds |>
  count(journal_year) |>
  tidyr::complete(
    journal_year = full_seq(journal_year, 1),
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = journal_year, y = n)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1870, 1905, by = 5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Use of Fine-Scale Wind Directions Over Time",
    subtitle = "Counts of 32-point compass directions (e.g., SbW, EbN, NWbN)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)


ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/wind_precision_plot.png",
  plot = wind_precision_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r frequency of wind direction by month}
top_dirs <- journal_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>
  count(wind_dir_code_1, sort = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 8) |>
  pull(wind_dir_code_1)

monthly_wind <- journal_data |>
  filter(wind_dir_code_1 %in% top_dirs) |>
  count(month, wind_dir_code_1) |>
  group_by(month) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    month_abbr = month(
      match(
        month,
        month.name
      ),
      label = TRUE,
      abbr = TRUE
    ),
    highlight = case_when(!wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("S", "N", "NW", "E", "W") ~ "Other",
                          TRUE ~ wind_dir_code_1)
  )

wind_heatmap <- ggplot(
  monthly_wind,
  aes(
    x = month_abbr,
    y = fct_reorder(wind_dir_code_1, prop, .fun = max),
    fill = prop
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Trends in Wind Direction",
    subtitle = "Relative frequency within month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Wind direction",
    fill = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/wind_direction_monthly_heat_map.png",
  plot = wind_heatmap,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)


```

```{r monthly wind heat map polar}


month_levels <- c(
  "January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June",
  "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"
)

directions <- c(
  "N","NNE","NE","ENE","E","ESE","SE","SSE",
  "S","SSW","SW","WSW","W","WNW","NW","NNW"
)

monthly_wind_heatmap <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    month = factor(month, levels = month_levels),
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(wind_dir_code_1, levels = directions)
  ) |>
  count(month, wind_dir_code_1) |>
  complete(month, wind_dir_code_1, fill = list(n = 0)) |>
  group_by(month) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n),
    n_fill = if_else(n == 0, NA_real_, as.numeric(n))
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1))

polar_heatmap <- ggplot(monthly_wind_heatmap, aes(wind_dir_code_1, month, fill = n_fill)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "lightblue",
    high = "navy",
    na.value = "white",
    name = "Count"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(month_levels)) +
  labs(
    title = "Wind Direction Counts by Month",
    x = "Wind Direction",
    y = "Month"
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "x", start = 29 * pi / 15, direction = -1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_wind_direction_polar_heatmap.png",
  plot = polar_heatmap,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```


## heatmap median 16 point

```{r median wind 16 point}

directions_16 <- c(
  "N","NNE","NE","ENE",
  "E","ESE","SE","SSE",
  "S","SSW","SW","WSW",
  "W","WNW","NW","NNW"
)

monthly_wind_16_heatmap <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    month = factor(month, levels = month_levels),
    year = year(date_mdy),

    wind_dir_16 = case_when(
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("N", "NbE", "NbW") ~ "N",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NNE") ~ "NNE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NE", "NEbN", "NEbE") ~ "NE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("ENE", "EbN") ~ "ENE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("E", "EbS") ~ "E",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("ESE", "SEbE") ~ "ESE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SE", "SEbS") ~ "SE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SSE", "SbE") ~ "SSE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("S", "SbW") ~ "S",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SSW", "SWbS") ~ "SSW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SW", "SWbW") ~ "SW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("WSW", "WbS") ~ "WSW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("W", "WbN") ~ "W",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("WNW", "NWbW") ~ "WNW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NW", "NWbN") ~ "NW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NNW") ~ "NNW",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    wind_dir_16 = factor(wind_dir_16, levels = directions_16)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_16), !is.na(year)) |>
  count(year, month, wind_dir_16, name = "n") |>
  complete(
    year,
    month,
    wind_dir_16,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) |>
  group_by(month, wind_dir_16) |>
  summarise(
    median_n = median(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    median_fill = if_else(median_n == 0, NA_real_, median_n)
  )

polar_16_med_heatmap <- ggplot(
  monthly_wind_heatmap,
  aes(wind_dir_16, month, fill = median_fill)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "lightblue",
    high = "navy",
    na.value = "white",
    name = "Median count"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(month_levels)) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Wind Direction Counts by Month",
    x = "Wind Direction",
    y = "Month"
  ) +
  coord_polar(
    theta = "x",
    start = -pi / 16,
    direction = -1
  )  +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/polar_16_med_heatmap.png",
  plot = polar_16_med_heatmap,
  width = 14,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300
)

```


```{r monthly wind line plot}

month_ts <- ggplot(
  monthly_wind,
  aes(
    x = month_abbr,
    y = prop,
    color = fct_reorder(highlight, desc(prop)),
    group = wind_dir_code_1
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    aes(
      linewidth = highlight == "Other"
    ),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(
    values = c(
      "TRUE" = 1,
      "FALSE" = 1.5
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "N" = "#440154FF",
      "NW" = "#21908CFF",
      "S" = "#FDE725FF",
      "Other" = "grey75"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Wind Direction Trends",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Proportion of observations",
    color = "Direction"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)


ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_wind_S_N_NW_E_highlighted.png",
  plot = month_ts,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

```

```{r month and year wind line plot}

month_year_ts <- ggplot(
  monthly_year_wind,
  aes(
    x = month,
    y = prop,
    color = highlight,
    group = wind_dir_code_1
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    aes(linewidth = highlight == "Other"),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(
    values = c(
      "TRUE" = 1,
      "FALSE" = 1.5
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "N" = "#440154FF",
      "NW" = "#21908CFF",
      "S" = "#FDE725FF",
      "E" = "#5DC863FF",
      "W" = "#555154FF",
      "Other" = "grey75"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 0.75)) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Wind Direction Trends Over Time",
    x = "",
    y = "Proportion of observations",
    color = "Direction"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
  breaks = 1:12,
  labels = month.abb
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 4)  +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) 

month_year_ts

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_wind_trends_wout_1872.png",
  plot = month_year_ts,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r monthly summary plot}
monthly_summary <- monthly_year_wind |>
  group_by(month, highlight) |>
  summarise(
    median_prop = median(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(prop, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(prop, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(highlight != "Other")

month_summary_trend <- ggplot(monthly_summary, aes(x = month, y = median_prop, color = highlight, fill = highlight)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
    alpha = 0.18,
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Typical Monthly Wind Direction Pattern",
    subtitle = "Line shows median monthly proportion \nRibbon shows interquartile range across years",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Proportion of observations",
    color = "Direction",
    fill = "Direction"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "N" = "#440154FF",
      "NW" = "#21908CFF",
      "S" = "#FDE725FF",
      "E" = "#5DC863FF",
      "W" = "#555154FF",
      "Other" = "grey75"
    )
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "N" = "#440154FF",
      "NW" = "#21908CFF",
      "S" = "#FDE725FF",
      "E" = "#5DC863FF",
      "W" = "#555154FF",
      "Other" = "grey75"
    )
  ) 

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/month_summary_trend.png",
  plot = month_summary_trend,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

```





```{r monthly wind polar plot}

polar_seasonal_plot <- monthly_wind |>
  filter(wind_dir_code_1 != "S") |>
  ggplot(
  aes(
    x = month_abbr,
    y = prop,
    group = wind_dir_code_1,
    color = highlight
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    aes(linewidth = highlight == "Other"),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = highlight != "Other"),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(
    values = c(
      "TRUE" = 0.4,
      "FALSE" = 1.4
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_size_manual(
    values = c(
      "TRUE" = 2.2,
      "FALSE" = 1
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "N" = "#440154FF",
      "NW" = "#21908CFF",
      "E" = "#FDE725FF",
      "Other" = "grey75"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Pattern in Wind Direction",
    subtitle = "Monthly relative frequency among top wind directions excluding S",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of observations",
    color = "Direction"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey40"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_polar()

polar_seasonal_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/monthly_wind_direction_polar.png",
  plot = polar_seasonal_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

```

```{r frequency of wind by direction}

journal_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>   # drop NA rows
  count(wind_dir_code_1) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wind_dir_code_1, y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
   scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c( "N","NNE","NE","ENE","E","ESE","SE","SSE","S","SSW","SW","WSW","W","WNW","NW","NNW")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "All observations",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) + 
  coord_polar()

```

```{r frequency of wind by direction polar 32}

journal_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>   # drop NA rows
  count(wind_dir_code_1) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wind_dir_code_1, y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
   scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("N", "NbE", "NNE", "NEbN", "NE", "NEbE", "ENE", "EbN",
    "E", "EbS", "ESE", "SEbE", "SE", "SEbS", "SSE", "SbE",
    "S", "SbW", "SSW", "SWbS", "SW", "SWbW", "WSW", "WbS",
    "W", "WbN", "WNW", "NWbW", "NW", "NWbN", "NNW", "NbW")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "All observations",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) + 
  coord_polar()

```

```{r polar all directions}
polar_plot <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    wind_dir_simple = case_when(
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NbE", "NbW") ~ "N",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NEbN", "NEbE") ~ "NE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("EbN", "EbS") ~ "E",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SEbE", "SEbS") ~ "SE",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SbE", "SbW") ~ "S",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("SWbS", "SWbW") ~ "SW",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("WbN", "WbS") ~ "W",
      wind_dir_code_1 %in% c("NWbW", "NWbN") ~ "NW",
      TRUE ~ wind_dir_code_1
    ),
    wind_dir_simple = factor(wind_dir_simple, levels = dir_levels_simple)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_simple)) |>
  count(wind_dir_simple) |>
  mutate(
    label_n = if_else(n > 100, as.character(n), "")
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wind_dir_simple, y = sqrt(n))) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(
    aes(y = sqrt(n) + max(sqrt(n), na.rm = TRUE)*0.04,
        label = label_n),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = dir_levels_simple,
    labels = dir_labels_simple,
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "Square-root scaled counts; labels show raw counts above 50",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_polar() 

polar_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/wind_direction_all_polar.png",
  plot = polar_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r frequency of wind by direction 2}
journal_data |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_2)) |>
  count(wind_dir_code_2) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wind_dir_code_2, y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c( "N","NNE","NE","ENE","E","ESE","SE","SSE","S","SSW","SW","WSW","W","WNW","NW","NNW")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "All observations",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_polar()

```

```{r wind-shift}
directions_16_na <- c(
  "N","NNE","NE","ENE","E","ESE","SE","SSE",
  "S","SSW","SW","WSW","W","WNW","NW","NNW"#,
  #"No Second Wind"
)

wind_shift <- journal_data |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(
      wind_dir_code_1,
      levels = directions_16
    ),
  #  wind_dir_code_2 = case_when(
  #    is.na(wind_dir_code_2) ~ "No Second Wind",
  #    TRUE ~ wind_dir_code_2
  #  ),
    wind_dir_code_2 = factor(
      wind_dir_code_2,
      levels = directions_16_na
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_dir_code_1)) |>
  count(wind_dir_code_1, wind_dir_code_2, name = "n") |>
  complete(
    wind_dir_code_1,
    wind_dir_code_2,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )

ggplot(wind_shift, aes(x = fct_rev(wind_dir_code_1), y = wind_dir_code_2, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = if_else(n > 0, as.character(n), "")),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "lightblue",
    high = "navy",
    name = "Count"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wind Direction Shifts",
    subtitle = "From first recorded direction to second recorded direction",
    x = "First wind direction",
    y = "Second wind direction"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_flip()


```


## Transitions

```{r top shifts}
directions_16 <- c(
  "N","NNE","NE","ENE","E","ESE","SE","SSE",
  "S","SSW","SW","WSW","W","WNW","NW","NNW"
)

# Count transitions by month
wind_shifts_ts <- journal_data |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    year_month = floor_date(date_mdy, "month"),
    month = month(date_mdy),
    shift = paste(wind_dir_code_1, "\u2192", wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  count(year_month, month, shift, name = "n")

# Top 6 transitions overall
top_shifts <- wind_shifts_ts |>
  group_by(shift) |>
  summarise(total_n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") |>
  slice_max(total_n, n = 6) |>
  pull(shift)

# Keep only top 6 and fill missing months
wind_shifts_top6 <- wind_shifts_ts |>
  filter(shift %in% top_shifts) |>
  tidyr::complete(
    year_month = seq(
      min(year_month),
      max(year_month),
      by = "month"
    ),
    shift,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )

wind_shifts_top6_month <- wind_shifts_ts |>
  summarize(total_month = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  tidyr::complete(
    month = seq(
      min(month),
      max(month),
      by = "month"
    ),
    shift,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )
```

```{r top shifts plot year and month}

directions_16 <- c(
  "N", "NNE", "NE", "ENE",
  "E", "ESE", "SE", "SSE",
  "S", "SSW", "SW", "WSW",
  "W", "WNW", "NW", "NNW"
)

# Create all recorded wind shifts
wind_shifts_all <- journal_data |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    year_month = floor_date(date_mdy, "month"),
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(wind_dir_code_1, levels = directions_16),
    wind_dir_code_2 = factor(wind_dir_code_2, levels = directions_16)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    shift = paste(wind_dir_code_1, "\u2192", wind_dir_code_2)
  )

# Count each shift by month
monthly_shift_counts <- wind_shifts_all |>
  count(year_month, shift, name = "n")

# Count all recorded wind shifts by month
monthly_total_shifts <- wind_shifts_all |>
  count(year_month, name = "total_shifts")

# Identify the top 6 shifts overall
top_shifts <- monthly_shift_counts |>
  group_by(shift) |>
  summarise(
    total_n = sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  slice_max(total_n, n = 6) |>
  pull(shift)

# Keep top 6 shifts and calculate monthly proportion
wind_shifts_top6_prop <- monthly_shift_counts |>
  filter(shift %in% top_shifts) |>
  complete(
    year_month = seq(
      min(year_month, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(year_month, na.rm = TRUE),
      by = "month"
    ),
    shift = top_shifts,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) |>
  left_join(monthly_total_shifts, by = "year_month") |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / total_shifts
  )

# plot
shift_heatmap <- ggplot(
  wind_shifts_top6_prop,
  aes(
    x = year_month,
    y = forcats::fct_reorder(shift, n, .fun = sum),
    fill = prop
  )
) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    na.value = "white",
    name = "Proportion\nof shifts"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Most Common Wind Direction Shifts Through Time",
    subtitle = "Monthly proportion of all recorded wind shifts represented by the top 6 transitions",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Wind direction shift"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

shift_heatmap


ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/top6_wind_shift_monthly_relative_frequency_heatmap.png",
  plot = shift_heatmap,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r top shifts plot by month}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggridges)

directions_16 <- c(
  "N", "NNE", "NE", "ENE",
  "E", "ESE", "SE", "SSE",
  "S", "SSW", "SW", "WSW",
  "W", "WNW", "NW", "NNW"
)

wind_shifts_all <- journal_data |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    month_num = month(date_mdy),
    wind_dir_code_1 = factor(wind_dir_code_1, levels = directions_16),
    wind_dir_code_2 = factor(wind_dir_code_2, levels = directions_16)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_1),
    !is.na(wind_dir_code_2),
    !is.na(month_num)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    shift = paste(wind_dir_code_1, "\u2192", wind_dir_code_2)
  )

top_shifts <- wind_shifts_all |>
  count(shift, sort = TRUE) |>
  filter(n >= 75) |>
  pull(shift)

wind_shifts_density <- wind_shifts_all |>
  filter(shift %in% top_shifts) |>
  mutate(
    shift = forcats::fct_reorder(shift, month_num, .fun = median)
  )

shift_density_plot <- ggplot(
  wind_shifts_density,
  aes(
    x = month_num,
    y = shift,
    fill = shift
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(
    alpha = 0.75,
    scale = 1.4,
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    limits = c(1, 12)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Timing of Common Wind Direction Shifts",
    subtitle = "Density of observed shifts by month for the top 6 transitions",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Wind direction shift",
    fill = "Shift"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

shift_density_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/top6_wind_shift_seasonal_density.png",
  plot = shift_density_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r tile shifts}

wind_shifts_tile <- wind_shifts_all |>
  filter(shift %in% top_shifts) |>
  count(shift, month_num, name = "n") |>
  group_by(shift) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n)
  ) |>
  ungroup()


shift_tile_plot <- ggplot(
  wind_shifts_tile,
  aes(
    x = month_num,
    y = forcats::fct_reorder(shift, prop, .fun = max),
    fill = prop
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    name = "Proportion\nof occurrences"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Timing of Common Wind Direction Shifts",
    subtitle = "Monthly distribution of the top 6 wind-direction transitions",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Wind direction shift"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

shift_tile_plot
```
```{r histogram shift plot}
shift_hist_plot <- ggplot(
  wind_shifts_density,
  aes(x = month_num)
) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ shift, ncol = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Timing of Common Wind Direction Shifts",
    subtitle = "Monthly counts of observed shifts, faceted by direction shift",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

shift_hist_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/top_wind_shift_seasonal_histogram_facets.png",
  plot = shift_hist_plot,
  width = 11,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r frequency of wind by direction most frequent}
journal_wind_df |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_direction)) |>
  count(wind_direction) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(wind_direction, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "Ordered by most frequent",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r wind direction by frequency}
journal_wind_df |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_direction)) |>
  count(wind_direction) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(wind_direction, -n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "Ordered by most frequent",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r proportion plot of relative frequency of wind by direction}
journal_wind_df |>
  filter(!is.na(wind_direction)) |>
  count(wind_direction) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wind_direction, y = prop)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 0.1)),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("N","NE","E","SE","S","SW","W","NW")) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative Frequency of Wind by Direction",
    subtitle = "Proportion of total observations",
    x = "Wind direction",
    y = "Proportion of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )



```
